pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point for tyre shopping and car services, with quick access to tyre search and key service bookings. Provides a tyre size search widget, featured tyre categories, highlighted services, and current promotions.
primary_functions: Start tyre search by size (width, profile, rim) and season directly from the homepage
Provide quick links to key tyre categories (winter, summer, all-season, performance)
Provide quick access to main services such as wheel alignment, oil change, and full service packages
Highlight promotions such as free fitting or discount codes for services and tyres

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit tyre size search form on the homepage
Click on a quick tyre category tile (e.g., Winter Tyres, Performance Tyres)
Click on a featured service card (e.g., Wheel Alignment, Oil Change, Full Service)
Click on 'View all services' link or Services teaser
Click on 'View service packages' teaser
Click on a featured tyre product card from promotions
Click on the cart icon or 'Cart' link in the header

access_methods.description: Main site entry via 'Home' header link
Direct visits/bookmarks to the root URL or index.html

pages.name: Tyre Listing & Search
pages.description: Main tyre catalogue page with size selector, filters, sorting, and product listing. Supports entry from the homepage search, quick category links, and direct navigation to refine tyre choices and start comparison.
primary_functions: Allow users to search tyres by size fields: width, profile, rim diameter
Filter tyres by season/type (winter, summer, all-season), performance/usage, speed rating, brand tier (budget/mid_range/premium), benefits (e.g., free fitting), customer rating, and price range
Sort tyre results by customer rating, price, or other criteria (e.g., 'Customer Rating: High to Low', 'Price: Low to High')
Display tyre product cards with key info (price, rating, season, noise, fuel rating) and enable navigation to tyre detail pages
Let users select tyres for comparison using checkboxes and open the comparison table

incoming_params.description: Preselected tyre width from homepage search or previous listing state (e.g., 205)
Optional season filter preset from homepage or quick category, values like 'winter', 'summer', 'all_season'
Optional performance/usage preset such as 'performance' or 'sport' from quick category tiles
Optional brand tier filter to reload results (e.g., 'mid_range')
Optional flag ('1' or '0') indicating whether to filter for tyres that include free fitting
Optional minimum customer rating filter threshold (e.g., 4 or 4.5)
Optional maximum price per tyre filter (e.g., 120 or 150)
Selected sort option code, such as 'customer_rating_desc' or 'price_asc'
Current pagination page for tyre results

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a tyre product card in the listing
Click the 'Compare' button after selecting multiple tyres with comparison checkboxes
Change filters, sorting, or pagination controls and reload the results
Click the cart icon in the header while viewing the listing

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Tyres' link in the main header navigation
Accessed with pre-filled query parameters from the homepage search or internal links
Users can bookmark or directly visit tyres.html with or without query parameters

pages.name: Tyre Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for a specific tyre, with purchase and fitting options. Shows technical specs, ratings, and allows adding tyres to the cart.
primary_functions: Display full tyre specifications including size, season, performance category, speed rating, noise (dB), fuel efficiency, and customer reviews
Allow users to set quantity of tyres (e.g., 2 or 4) before adding to cart
Provide options to add tyres to cart with or without fitting (e.g., 'Add to Cart' or 'Add with Fitting')
Show eligibility for extras such as free fitting or promotions tied to the tyre product

incoming_params.description: TyreProduct.id for the tyre being viewed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' or equivalent after successfully adding tyres to the cart
Click 'Back to results' or 'More tyres in this size' link

access_methods.description: Accessed via tyre_detail.html?id={tyreProductId} from listings, homepage promos, or comparison

pages.name: Tyre Comparison
pages.description: Side-by-side comparison table for selected tyre products. Users can compare specs and quickly navigate to details or add a chosen tyre to the cart.
primary_functions: Display up to several selected tyres in a comparison table with specs like price, noise level, fuel efficiency, wet grip, and ratings
Highlight key differences such as noise 370 dB and fuel rating A/B to help users choose
Allow users to navigate to a specific tyre�19s detail page via product name or 'View Details' links
Optionally allow adding a chosen tyre directly to the cart from the comparison view

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the TyreComparisonSet created from the listing page selection

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a tyre name or 'View Details' link in the comparison table
Click 'View Cart' after adding a tyre to the cart from the comparison table
Click 'Back to results' or 'Back to search' link

access_methods.description: Accessed via tyre_compare.html?comparisonSetId={id} after creating a comparison set on the listing page

pages.name: Services Overview
pages.description: Catalogue of all available services and service packages. Users can browse wheel alignment, oil change, full service packages and navigate into booking flows.
primary_functions: List core services such as wheel alignment and oil change with brief descriptions and 'View' or 'Book' calls-to-action
List service packages such as 'Full Service & Inspection' in a 'Service Packages' section
Allow filtering or jumping between regular services and service packages (e.g., via categoryId parameters)
Link users to individual service detail pages for booking (e.g., wheel alignment, oil change, full service & inspection)

incoming_params.description: Optional ServiceCategory.code to focus the view, e.g., 'service_packages' for packages or 'standard_services' for regular services

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'View' or 'Book' for a standard service like Wheel Alignment or Oil Change
Click on 'View' or 'Book' in the Service Packages section (e.g., Full Service & Inspection)

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Services' or 'Service Packages' links in the header navigation
Users can directly visit services.html or services.html?categoryId=service_packages

pages.name: Service Detail & Booking
pages.description: Dedicated detail and booking page for a specific service (wheel alignment, oil change, full service). Presents service info, collects vehicle and contact details, finds branches or mobile slots, and finalizes the booking.
primary_functions: Show service-specific information (scope of work, duration, pricing) for the selected service (e.g., serviceId=wheel_alignment, oil_change, full_service)
Collect vehicle details via dropdown fields (e.g., make, model, year, fuel type where relevant)
Allow users to enter a ZIP code, search for nearby branches or service centers, and show a list of centers ordered by proximity
Support selection of service mode where applicable (e.g., in-center vs mobile service for oil_change)
Provide a date picker to navigate months and choose specific dates (e.g., the 15th of next month or earliest date within 14 days)
Display available time slots for the selected date (e.g., 10:0012:00, 09:0011:00) and allow users to choose one
Capture customer contact details (name, phone, email) and, for mobile services, address details (street, city, ZIP)
Provide a field to enter and apply promo codes (e.g., SAVE20) for applicable services
Display and link to terms and conditions, require acceptance via a checkbox, and enable confirmation via a 'Confirm Booking', 'Continue', or 'Proceed' button

incoming_params.description: Service.code identifying which service is being booked, e.g., 'wheel_alignment', 'oil_change', 'full_service'
Preferred booking mode such as 'in_center' or 'mobile' (for oil changes); used to initialize mode toggles
Optional ZIP code preset for nearest branch search (e.g., 10001, 94105, 30301)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Confirm Booking', 'Continue', or similar after successfully creating a service booking
Click 'Back to services' link
Click on the 'Terms & Conditions' link from the booking form

access_methods.description: Accessed via service_detail.html?serviceCode={code}&mode={mode}&zip={zip} from Services overview or homepage featured services

pages.name: Shopping Cart
pages.description: Summary of all tyre items selected for purchase, with options to adjust quantities and book fitting. Acts as a hub before arranging fitting and reviewing the overall order.
primary_functions: Display all tyre items added to the cart with name, size, price per tyre, quantity, and subtotal
Allow users to update quantities or remove tyre items from the cart
Show indicators for tyres that have fitting included vs tyres that require fitting to be arranged
Provide a 'Book Fitting' or 'Arrange Fitting' button for tyre items to start the fitting appointment flow
Offer a path to proceed to the order review page after tyres and fitting appointments are set up

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Book Fitting' or 'Arrange Fitting' for one or more tyre items in the cart
Click 'Proceed to Review' or equivalent after tyres and any fittings are set
Click 'Continue shopping' from the cart

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Cart' link or cart icon in the header navigation
Users can directly visit cart.html to resume a saved cart

pages.name: Fitting Booking
pages.description: Flow to arrange an in-center fitting appointment for tyres in the cart. After selecting a location and time slot, users confirm contact details and return to order review.
primary_functions: Allow users to enter a ZIP code (e.g., 60601) and search for nearby fitting locations
Display a list of locations/branches with key info (distance, opening days, services offered)
Provide filters such as 'Open on Saturday' or 'Saturday appointments' to refine fitting locations
Allow selection of a specific branch (e.g., second branch in the list) for the fitting appointment
Provide a date picker to navigate to the next available Saturday and select that date
Display available time slots for the chosen Saturday and allow selection of an afternoon slot (e.g., 13:0015:00)
Collect or confirm user contact details (name and phone) for the fitting appointment
Allow users to confirm the fitting appointment and then continue to order review

incoming_params.description: Comma-separated list of CartItem IDs that should be included in this fitting appointment
Optional ZIP code to prefill the fitting location search (e.g., '60601')

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Confirm Fitting Appointment' and then any 'Continue' or 'Review Order' button
Click 'Back to Cart' link without confirming a fitting

access_methods.description: Accessed after starting the fitting booking flow from the Shopping Cart page
Accessed as fitting_booking.html?cartItemIds={ids}&zip={zip} when resuming a fitting flow

pages.name: Order Review
pages.description: Overall review of tyres in the cart and any associated service or fitting bookings before finalizing. Shows a combined summary, totals, and allows final confirmation.
primary_functions: Summarize tyre items, quantities, and pricing alongside any booked fitting appointments
Summarize service bookings (e.g., wheel alignment, full service, mobile oil change) including dates, times, locations, and contact details
Allow users to review and verify all details before completing their journey
Provide a final 'Confirm Order' or similar action if needed, or act as a confirmation summary page after bookings

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Home' after a successful order confirmation
Click 'Edit Cart' or 'Change tyres' from the review page
Click 'Amend booking' for a specific service from the summary list
Click 'View full Terms & Conditions' link from the review page

access_methods.description: Accessed after clicking 'Proceed to Review' from the Shopping Cart
Accessed after confirming a standalone service booking
Accessed after confirming a fitting appointment

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Information about the company, its branches, and expertise in tyres and car services. Builds trust by describing coverage, experience, and service quality.
primary_functions: Describe the companys background, values, and service standards
Summarize types of services and tyre offerings to build trust with users
Provide high-level information about branch coverage areas and capabilities

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact us' CTA within About Us content
Click 'View our services' link from About Us

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About Us' link in the footer navigation
Users can directly visit about.html from bookmarks or search engines

pages.name: Contact Us
pages.description: Contact information and form for customer inquiries. Provides phone, email, main branch addresses, and a simple enquiry form.
primary_functions: Display contact details such as phone numbers, email addresses, and main branch addresses
Provide a contact form for general questions or support requests
Optionally display a map or simple indication of main service areas

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Home' from the Contact page
Click 'View services' from a support-related CTA

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact Us' link in the footer navigation
Users can directly visit contact.html or land here from external links

pages.name: FAQs
pages.description: Answers to common questions about tyres, fitting, and service bookings. Helps users understand processes, policies, and terminology.
primary_functions: Provide clarifications on tyre selection, sizing, and differences between seasons and performance categories
Explain how service booking works, including in-center and mobile services
Clarify policies on cancellations, rescheduling, and use of promo codes
Support users in understanding terms referenced in booking forms and checkboxes

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Book a service' from FAQ answers about services
Click 'Shop tyres' from FAQ answers about tyre selection
Click 'View full terms' from policy-related FAQ entries

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'FAQs' link in the footer navigation
Users can directly visit faq.html

pages.name: Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms governing tyre purchases, service bookings, and promotions. Linked from booking flows and order review.
primary_functions: Present full terms and conditions that users accept when booking services or purchasing tyres
Detail conditions around appointments, cancellations, and liability
Provide a reference linked from checkboxes on booking forms and order review pages

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to order review' after reading terms during checkout
Click browser back or 'Back to booking' link after viewing terms while booking a service

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Terms & Conditions' link in the footer navigation
Users can directly visit terms.html via external links

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Explanation of how customer data is collected, stored, and used. Covers booking data, contact details, cookies, and tracking.
primary_functions: Explain data handling for contact details, vehicle information, and booking information
Describe cookie usage and tracking relevant to the website
Support compliance with privacy regulations and build trust with users

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Home' from the Privacy Policy page

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Privacy Policy' link in the footer navigation
Users can directly visit privacy.html via external links

header_links.description: Homepage with tyre search and featured services
Browse and search tyres by size, season, performance, and price
Overview of available services like wheel alignment and oil change
View bundled service packages such as full service and inspection
View tyres in your cart and arrange fitting or proceed to review

footer_links.description: Browse and search the tyre catalogue
View all available car services and packages
Learn more about the company and its expertise
Frequently asked questions about tyres and services
Legal terms for purchases and bookings
Information on how your data is used and protected
